message:
style: suppress clippy::too_many_lines on long but cohesive functions

Added #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to Http1Codec::encode() and
runtime_state_refinement_map_cross_entity_liveness_contract_is_wired().
Both functions are long because their logic is inherently sequential and
tightly coupled (response encoding phases / contract validation steps),
not because they need refactoring into smaller units.  Also removed a
stray blank line in the encode method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
